description: Test fixture: Application that should receive a CONDITIONAL_PASS verdict

submission.architecture: Monolith transitioning to microservices, single region

observability.metrics: CloudWatch basic metrics, CPU and memory tracked, no custom business metrics, no latency percentiles
observability.logging: Unstructured logs in CloudWatch Logs, no correlation IDs, no PII redaction
observability.alerting: CloudWatch alarms on CPU > 80% and 5xx > 5%, no SLO-based alerts, emails to team distribution list
observability.dashboards: Basic CloudWatch dashboard, infrastructure metrics only

slos.availability: 99.9% target documented but not actively measured

incident_management.on_call: Informal rotation among 3 engineers, no secondary, business hours coverage only
incident_management.runbooks: 5 runbooks exist but last updated 8 months ago
incident_management.incident_process: Ad-hoc, no formal severity classification, team lead acts as IC
incident_management.postmortems: Done occasionally for major outages, no template, action items not tracked

resilience.fault_tolerance: Single AZ deployment, single database instance, manual failover
resilience.patterns: Basic retries on HTTP calls, no circuit breakers, some timeouts configured
resilience.capacity: Fixed instance size, no auto-scaling, load tested once 6 months ago
resilience.dr: Daily database backups, RTO/RPO not formally defined, no DR drills

deployment.cicd: Jenkins pipeline, unit tests at 60% coverage, no security scanning
deployment.strategy: Rolling update, no canary, health check gating
deployment.rollback: Manual rollback, takes ~15 minutes, DB migrations not always backward-compatible
deployment.change_management: Changes tracked in Jira, no formal approval process
